## RC4157 Deducting Income Tax on Pension and Other Income, and Filing the T4A Slip and Summary
Deducting Income Tax on Pension and Other Income, and Filing the T4A Slip and Summary Information for employers about deducting income tax on pension and other income and filing the T4A slip and summary.
